tasks.rationale: Charter objective F and research-agenda question 6 have no queued primary-source work: the repository specifies what expertise artifacts should contain but not how limited-resource experts can participate with motivation, trust, consent, ownership, and useful role boundaries intact. This 12-week ethnographic study observes real expert-developer collaboration and appears to provide nonduplicative evidence for a cross-domain contribution workflow rather than another benchmark family.
